## Feature Description
<!-- Clear description of what you'd like -->


## Use Case
<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? -->


## Proposed Solution
<!-- How might this work? -->


## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any other approaches you've thought about -->


## Type of Contribution
<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] New slash command
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Improvement to existing command/agent
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD workflow
- [ ] Language-specific template
- [ ] Other

## Would you like to implement this?
<!-- Are you interested in contributing this yourself? -->

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] I'd like help implementing this
- [ ] No, just suggesting

<!-- Screenshots, examples, references -->
